title: SACRAMENTO, Calif --- The California Natural Resources Agency just announced the approval of 39 projects across the state, with three of them coming as a result of Assemblymember G
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: The Urban Greening Program is financed by Cap-and-Trade revenue.
The Urban Greening Program focuses on projects that reduce greenhouse gases.
The Urban Greening Program is aimed at decreasing energy consumption.
The Urban Greening Program provides other environmental benefits.
The projects approved will create job opportunities.
The approved projects will take place in areas where constituents feel left behind.
